text:
F0500B Interview for Activity Preferences: Music Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they listen to music that they like while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but can't do or no choice
9=No response or non-responsive
^=Blank (skip pattern)
189 F0500C_ANML_CD F0500C_ANML_CD F0500C Interview for Activity Preferences: Animal
